name: Peggy Glanville-Hicks
abstract: Peggy Winsome Glanville-Hicks (29 December 1912 – 25 June 1990) was an Australian composer and music critic.

about_quotes.speaker: William T. (Bill) Challis
about_quotes.evidence: I have not found a teacher of this particular type of hybrid music, but have certainly found sympathetic people in music who are making efforts along these same lines; such people as Peggy Glanville-Hicks...
